title: anthopogon macounii
side_effects: Anthopogon macounii can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and gastrointestinal issues. Ingesting large amounts of the plant can cause nausea, vomiting, and abdominal pain. Excessive use of the plant's extracts may also lead to increased heart rate and blood pressure, potentially causing cardiovascular problems. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxic compounds can cause liver and kidney damage in severe cases.
